item.title: United Airlines Picks GE Engines To Power New Boeing 787 Dreamliners
item.description: United Airlines (NASDAQ: UAL) selects GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) for 300 GEnx engines to power new Boeing 787 Dreamliners. Importance Rank: 1 read more

item.title: Apple Challenges Netflix, YouTube And Spotify With New Video Podcasting Feature
item.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) has announced its plans to launch a new integrated video podcast experience on its Apple Podcasts app this spring. Importanc...

item.title: Anthropic Could Face 'Supply Chain Risk' Tag As Pentagon Weighs Cutting Ties: Report
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is reportedly contemplating ending the Department of War's association with AI firm Anthropic. Importance Rank: 1 read ...

item.title: Why ZIM Integrated Shipping Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 38%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
